start.speaker: Pliable
start.text: A shining city, crowns, and joy without end? I will come too. Surely a road to such a place must be pleasant enough.

choices.text: Walk with me, then. Keep your eyes on more than the reward.
choices.text_zh: 那就与我同行。把眼目放在赏赐之外更多的事上。

choices.text: The promise is great, but the road will test whether you love truth or only comfort.
choices.text_zh: 应许极大，但这路要试验：你爱的是真理，还是只爱安逸。

start.text_zh: 一座闪耀的城、冠冕、无尽的喜乐？那我也来。通往那等地方的路，想必够惬意吧。

light.speaker: Pliable
light.text: Hard? Perhaps a little. But why dwell on mud when we can speak of gold? Come, let us hurry to the pleasant parts.
light.text_zh: 难？或许有一点。可既能谈论黄金，何必纠缠泥泞？来，我们快往惬意的部分去。
